catalysts.note: No scheduled catalysts today or tomorrow. Next week is loaded: FOMC decision Wed 06-17, quad-witching options expiration Thu 06-18.

bias.analyst: Gap up about one percent after yesterday's lower shelf survived a six-hour attack - the absorbed sellers are paying for it this morning. Price parked just under the first upper resistance band. Plan: let the first 30 minutes classify the day; chase nothing before confirmation. A hold above the upper band targets continuation; losing the mid-range reference reopens the trapdoor scenario.
bias.commentator: The home side won the siege yesterday and they're up early this morning! Theo's squad walks out confident, pressing right at the away team's first defensive line before kickoff. The manager's orders: no shots before the first half-hour tells us what kind of match this is. Break that line and hold it - we attack. Lose midfield - everyone back to defend.

events.analyst: Theo Live is now public. From here on, session events appear in this feed with a delay - wins, losses, and the days we sit on our hands.
events.commentator: Welcome to the grounds! The gates are open for the first time. Pre-season record is on the board - including the losses. We hide nothing here, folks.
